/projects/opt/x86_64/gcc/9.2.0/bin/g++  -O3 -DNDEBUG -g -O3 -g -O3  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/face_test.dir/face_tests.cpp.o  -o face_test -Wl,-rpath,/home/ddunning/CLAMR/mesh/hsfc:/home/ddunning/CLAMR/mesh/kdtree:/home/ddunning/CLAMR/mesh/zorder:/home/ddunning/CLAMR/s7:/home/ddunning/CLAMR/timer:/home/ddunning/CLAMR/memstats:/home/ddunning/CLAMR/genmalloc:/projects/opt/x86_64/openmpi/4.0.2-gcc_9.2.0/lib ../libmesh.a ../../crux/libcrux.a ../../hash/libhash.a ../hsfc/libhsfc.so.2.0.0 ../kdtree/libkdtree.so.2.0.0 ../zorder/libzorder.so.2.0.0 ../../s7/libs7.so.2.0.7 ../../timer/libtimer.so.2.0.7 ../../memstats/libmemstats.so.2.0.7 ../../l7/libl7.a ../../genmalloc/libgenmalloc.so.2.0.7 ../../MallocPlus/libMallocPlus.a -lm /projects/opt/x86_64/openmpi/4.0.2-gcc_9.2.0/lib/libmpi.so
